businessQuestion: Which suppliers have the lowest fill rate?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DS.SUPPLIER_NAME,
    DS.COUNTRY,
    AVG(FSD.FILL_RATE_PCT) AS AVG_FILL_RATE,
    AVG(FSD.DELAY_DAYS) AS AVG_DELAY_DAYS,
    AVG(FSD.DEFECT_RATE_PCT) AS AVG_DEFECT_RATE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_SUPPLIER_DELIVERY FSD
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_SUPPLIER DS
    ON FSD.SUPPLIER_KEY = DS.SUPPLIER_KEY
GROUP BY
    DS.SUPPLIER_NAME,
    DS.COUNTRY
ORDER BY AVG_FILL_RATE ASC;
businessContext: Procurement teams want to identify suppliers failing to deliver requested quantities.
